CurrentIssues.ID: MayBeConstant:KursiTheme.kt:TextureTokens$/** * Film-grain per-pixel noise amplitude added by the [com.kursi.designsystem.shader.feltMaterial] * runtime-shader pass (additive, centred on zero ã keep tiny, this is texture not TV static). */ val filmGrainIntensity = 0.018f

MayBeConstant:KursiTheme.kt:TextureTokens$/** * Warm bloom lift strength around the key-light pool, added by the * [com.kursi.designsystem.shader.feltMaterial] runtime-shader pass. */ val warmBloomStrength = 0.05f
MayBeConstant:KursiTheme.kt:TextureTokens$/** Alpha of the engraved hatch on dark teak panels. */ val teakHatchAlpha = 0.04f
MayBeConstant:KursiTheme.kt:TextureTokens$/** Alpha of the ghosted chair-in-sunburst centre emblem. */ val emblomAlpha = 0.035f
MayBeConstant:KursiTheme.kt:TextureTokens$/** Alpha of the guillochûˋ line overlay on brass bezels. */ val guillocheLinesAlpha = 0.18f
MayBeConstant:KursiTheme.kt:TextureTokens$/** Alpha of the paper grain noise overlay on cream surfaces. */ val paperGrainAlpha = 0.06f
MayBeConstant:KursiTheme.kt:TextureTokens$/** Brass specular highlight width fraction (0..1). */ val brassSpecularWidth = 0.25f
MayBeConstant:KursiTheme.kt:TextureTokens$/** Number of guillochûˋ sine waves per 100dp of width. */ val guillocheDensity = 12
